name: nostr-rs-relay
label: nostr-rs-relay
description: A Rust Nostr relay with built-in whitelist and kind filtering

requiredConfig.name: Relay Domain
requiredConfig.description: The domain name for your Nostr relay (e.g., relay.example.com)

requiredConfig.name: Whitelisted Pubkeys (hex)
requiredConfig.description: Comma-separated hex pubkeys allowed to publish. Empty = no pubkey whitelist.

requiredConfig.name: Whitelisted Event Kinds
requiredConfig.description: Comma-separated event kind numbers allowed to publish. Empty = no kind whitelist.

requiredConfig.name: Blacklisted Event Kinds
requiredConfig.description: Comma-separated event kind numbers to reject. Used only when Whitelisted Event Kinds is empty.

requiredConfig.name: Require NIP-42 Auth
requiredConfig.description: Set to true to require NIP-42 authentication for publish.
